title: chrysanthemum alpicola
intro: Chrysanthemum alpicola, also known as alpine chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum alpicola include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and alleviate symptoms of allergies and respiratory issues. Chrysanthemum alpicola is often prepared into teas, infusions, and capsules for its medicinal uses.
